race.comment: TARTAN TIGER (4) went to the lead in a new role last start and kept finding to record a tough maiden win over 1500m at Goulburn, handling the soft conditions well. Good enough to take on this better field now. SIR SUBLIME (7) led for the judge and wouldn't lie down but was eventually defeated in a three-way thriller over the mile at Goulburn last time out. Very fit and will be hard to reel in again. TOKYO QUEEN (6) is yet to race beyond a mile so the decision to come here first-up is interesting. Has talent and cannot be underestimated. SPECIAL PROPHET (10) was strong through the line at Orange last start and will appreciate the extra 300m today. TAKE THE CHANCE (11) was brave in defeat when overhauled late over 2000m at Queanbeyan last time. Should give a great sight coming back to this trip.
